# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "dev-team-nsg",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the NSG"
      }
    },
    "allowedSourceAddressPrefixes": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of allowed source IP addresses or CIDR ranges"
      }
    },
    "enableJitAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Enable Just-In-Time VM Access integration"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "rdpPort": "3389",
    "sshPort": "22",
    "httpPort": "80",
    "httpsPort": "443"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Restricted",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP from authorized IP ranges only",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[variables('rdpPort')]",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefixes')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Restricted",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH from authorized IP ranges only",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[variables('sshPort')]",
              "sourceAddressPrefixes": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefixes')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS from internet",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[variables('httpsPort')]",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1200,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Redirect",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP for redirect to HTTPS only",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[variables('httpPort')]",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "Internet",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1300,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Deny all other inbound traffic",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    },
    "securityRecommendations": {
      "type": "object",
      "value": {
        "recommendation1": "Enable Azure Security Center Just-In-Time VM Access for RDP and SSH",
        "recommendation2": "Use Azure Bastion for secure RDP/SSH access without exposing ports",
        "recommendation3": "Implement Azure AD authentication and MFA for all access",
        "recommendation4": "Enable NSG Flow Logs for monitoring and threat detection",
        "recommendation5": "Regularly review and update allowed source IP ranges",
        "recommendation6": "Use Azure Firewall or Application Gateway with WAF for HTTP/HTTPS traffic",
        "recommendation7": "Enable Azure DDoS Protection Standard",
        "recommendation8": "Implement network segmentation with multiple NSGs"
      }
    }
  }
}
